response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical expertise across all required areas, he is severely overqualified for this entry-level position. As a current Staff Engineer at Google with 15+ years of experience across full-stack, distributed systems, and cloud infrastructure, his career trajectory and expectations are fundamentally misaligned with a junior IC role. Hiring him creates high flight-risk, potential salary mismatches, and wastes a position needed for earlier-career developer growth.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js expertise with proven ability to build scalable systems at major tech companies
True full-stack capabilities spanning React, REST APIs, relational and NoSQL databases, and cloud infrastructure
Strong commitment to testing, code quality, and mentoring demonstrated through workshops, open-source contributions, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Severe overqualification (Staff engineer at Google) creates high flight-risk and suggests potential unhappiness or external pressure not disclosed
No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned; recent roles used custom frameworks and GraphQL, suggesting framework flexibility but not specific framework expertise the role prefers
No renewable energy or construction technology domain experience; 15-year career spanning diverse industries without focus in target sector

key_factors.factor: Code quality values and mentorship philosophy
